summary: Full regression testing of Emergent Document Hub after re-seeding. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%) and all frontend features verified working correctly via Playwright UI testing.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Email already registered' for test@test.com - expected behavior since user exists

passed_tests: Backend: User login with valid credentials
Backend: Categories parent-child structure (10 parents, 24 children)
Backend: GET single document by ID
Backend: Document CRUD flow (Create -> Read -> Update -> Delete)
Frontend: Login page loads and login works
Frontend: Dashboard shows 10 category cards with document counts
Frontend: Sidebar navigation with collapsible categories
Frontend: Mermaid diagrams render as SVG (not code blocks) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Document viewer shows breadcrumb, title, content, TOC
Frontend: Tables render correctly in documents
Frontend: Search dialog opens with Ctrl+K
Frontend: Search dialog opens via sidebar button
Frontend: Bookmarks toggle and page work
Frontend: New document editor with title, category, content
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is ~700 lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability
No error boundaries for graceful error handling in React
Console warnings about span elements in table structure (low priority)
seed_data_creation: Test category created during API tests, test documents created/deleted during CRUD tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database is seeded with 34 categories and 26 documents. 22+ documents contain mermaid diagrams. All APIs working. Test user exists: test@test.com / test1234. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_verified.user_auth: Registration, Login, Logout, JWT authentication all working
features_verified.categories: 34 categories with proper parent-child structure, GET and POST working
features_verified.documents: 26 documents, full CRUD operations working, mermaid content present
features_verified.bookmarks: Toggle on/off working, bookmarks page displaying correctly
features_verified.search: Search API and UI both working, Ctrl+K shortcut functional
features_verified.mermaid_diagrams: Rendering correctly as SVG graphics, not code blocks
features_verified.dark_light_mode: Toggle switching themes correctly, persists in localStorage
features_verified.sidebar: Navigation, collapse/expand, category tree all working
features_verified.document_viewer: Breadcrumbs, title, content, TOC all rendering correctly
